display.purpose: Hero h1 only. Source Serif 4, semibold, balanced line breaks.

headline.purpose: Section h2 titles across all pages.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, card descriptions, supporting copy. Source Sans 3.

shadows.name: panel-navy
shadows.purpose: Featured credential panels on navy backgrounds.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA — Book a Consultation, navigation actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Book a Consultation<svg class="ds-btn-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1a2744; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2a3d66; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 122, 140, 0.5); } .ds-btn-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions — Explore Services, Request Information.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #1a2744; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e0ddd6; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.025 200); border-color: rgba(26, 122, 140, 0.4); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 122, 140, 0.5); }

components.name: Teal Button
components.description: Marketing secondary CTA on gold-tinted sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-teal { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1a7a8c; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-teal:hover { background: #0f5a68; } .ds-btn-teal:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26, 122, 140, 0.5); }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Core services grid on homepage and services index.
components.html:
01

Federal Readiness Infrastructure

Build the internal scaffolding required to compete and deliver.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px -4px rgba(26, 39, 68, 0.08); ring: 1px solid rgba(26, 39, 68, 0.1); transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px -8px rgba(26, 39, 68, 0.18); } .ds-card-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(26, 122, 140, 0.15); margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border: 1px solid #e0ddd6; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #5c6478; float: right; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a2744; margin: 0 0 8px; clear: both; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5c6478; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Callout Alert
components.description: Signature quote callout — We don't write proposals.
components.html:
We don't write proposals.

We build the institutional maturity that makes winning possible.
components.css: .ds-alert { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(184, 134, 11, 0.3); background: rgba(184, 134, 11, 0.05); } .ds-alert-icon { margin-top: 2px; } .ds-alert-title { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a2744; margin: 0; grid-column: 2; } .ds-alert-desc { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #5c6478; margin: 4px 0 0; grid-column: 2; }

components.name: Section Badge
components.description: Selective section label — not on every block.
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e0ddd6; background: #ffffff; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f5a68; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Sticky header with active state and consultation CTA.
components.html: HomeAboutServicesContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 16px 32px; background: rgba(250, 249, 248, 0.95); border-bottom: 1px solid #e0ddd6; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5c6478; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f0eeea; color: #1a2744; } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(0.94 0.025 200); color: #0f5a68; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-cta { margin-left: 8px; background: #1a2744; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #2a3d66; }

components.name: Credential Panel
components.description: Navy founder credential card on About page.
components.html:
Director-level Organizational Effectiveness

Senior SBA AdvisorPresidential Appointment
components.css: .ds-credential { background: #1a2744; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 14px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px -4px rgba(26, 39, 68, 0.35); } .ds-credential-label { font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #d4a843; margin: 0 0 24px; } .ds-credential-item { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-credential-title { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-credential-sub { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-top: 2px; }

narrative.overview: This system presents Pazant Consulting as a selective, governance-forward federal advisory practice. The visual language is executive and legible: crisp hierarchy, restrained color commitment, and structure that signals institutional maturity. Warmth comes through typography pairing and human-centered narrative copy, not through decorative effects or marketing gloss.
keyCharacteristics: Serif headlines + sans body for executive editorial tone
Navy primary, teal secondary action, gold credential accent (≤10% of any screen)
shadcn Card, Badge, Alert, Sheet, Accordion as the component foundation
Tonal section backgrounds and dot-pattern overlays instead of heavy decoration
Scroll-reveal motion with full prefers-reduced-motion fallback
Max content width 72rem (1152px); body copy capped at ~65–75ch

rules.name: The Credential Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold appears on ≤10% of any screen. It signals credentials, quotes, and emphasis — never fills a hero or entire section.

rules.name: The Readable Muted Rule
rules.body: Muted text is never light gray on tinted near-white. If contrast is borderline, darken toward institutional navy.

rules.name: The Headline Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Display headings never exceed 3rem (~48px) at any breakpoint. Authority through weight and spacing, not size inflation.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows respond to hover or denote featured credential panels — never stacked decoratively on every element.

dos: Do use shadcn Card, Badge, Button, Alert, Sheet, Separator, and Accordion for all new UI.
Do assign navy to primary actions and teal to secondary marketing CTAs.
Do keep body text at WCAG AA contrast; test muted gray on tinted backgrounds.
Do use Source Serif 4 for h1–h3 and marketing card titles.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on all scroll and hover animations.
Do use verb + object CTA labels (Book a Consultation, View All Services).
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing pages, cream-and-navy AI slop, or marketing buzzwords in visual treatment.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) for headlines or emphasis.
Don't use hero metric dashboards (big numbers, progress bars, stat grids).
Don't use identical icon + heading + text card grids without variation in layout or hierarchy.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px) on cards, lists, or callouts.
Don't put uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section; badges are for selective labeling only.
Don't use glassmorphism, floating orbs, or decorative blur as default surface treatment.
Don't put gray muted text on colored backgrounds without darkening toward the background hue.
